_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Minecraft bot
author: email@localhost
description:
A Discord bot that manages your self-hosted Minecraft server infrastructure.

https://github.com/Skrriply/minecraft-bot

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash

echo "Starting server initialization..."

echo "Updating packages and installing git..."
apk update
apk add --no-cache git

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server || exit 1

if [ "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    echo "Directory is not empty. Skipping initial git clone."
else
    echo "Cloning repository..."
    git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
fi

echo "Installation completed successfully!"

variables.name: Python File
variables.description: The file that starts the bot

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull the latest files on startup
